    • update

      public void update(float delta)
      Update method that calculates all logic depending on time. It updates the position of the projectile based on its direction and speed.
      Parameters:
      delta - timme

    • render

      public void render(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.SpriteBatch spriteBatch)
      render method to render the projectile graphics
      Parameters:
      spriteBatch - renderer

    • collides

      public boolean collides(com.badlogic.gdx.math.Rectangle enemy)
      Method that checks if the projectile collides with an enemy by checking if their bounding rectangles overlap.
      Parameters:
      enemy - enemy to check collision with
      Returns:
      if projectile and enemy collide or not

      public boolean isActive()

      public void setActive(boolean active)
